response.overview: INVINCIBLE SEASON 1-4  Invincible follows teenage Mark Grayson as he inherits superhuman abilities from his father, Omni-Man, and transitions from a coming-of-age hero to a hardened warrior. The series spirals into galaxy-wide conflict, family betrayals, and multiversal wars as Mark fights to protect humanity from the ruthless Viltrumite Empire
response.tagline: Best Superhero Comic In The Universe
response.title: Invincible
